steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0010, t0021, and t0026 are completed.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create task folder structure (assets/library, assets/predictions, code, data, results, etc.).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Skipped: no new literature signal needed; prior surveys (t0017, t0025) already cover the relevant findings.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Skipped: re-run uses internal libraries; no external resources required.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0010 matched_mismatch, t0021 plan_and_solve_v2, and t0026 ABC harness to plan v3 / v2 forks and predictions reuse.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Design plan_and_solve_v3 fallback chain, matched_mismatch_v2 wrapper, B/C re-run harness, and cost estimate.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: no remote compute; single Anthropic provider, claude-opus-4-7 only.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Build plan_and_solve_v3 + matched_mismatch_v2 libraries, re-run B and C on 130 paired instances, run McNemar and calibration.

steps.name: teardown
steps.description: Skipped: no remote machines were provisioned.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: cut-corners directive; focus on closing RQ1/RQ5 with the bundled fix-and-rerun.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary.md, results_detailed.md, metrics.json, McNemar tables and calibration JSON, plus 4 charts.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Skipped: t0017 + t0025 already provide the literature comparison; no new external comparison needed for the fix-and-rerun.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Write suggestions.json with follow-up items raised by the re-run results.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Final reporting: capture session, run premerge verificator, push, PR, merge.
